creator: rmacklem@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note that all "sharenfs" does is generate an
an exports(5) file in /etc/zfs/exports.

You can always write a /etc/exports manually
as an alternative to using "sharenfs".

I am not conversant with ZFS but have been
messing with "sharenfs" recently.
I will take a look and see if I can figure
out why the error is generated.
